name: Neueon Towers Limited
summary: Neueon Towers Limited manufactures and trades in iron and steel products in India and internationally. The company offers galvanized steel products. It also manufactures various telecom/transmission and power towers, as well as TSF products. The company was formerly known as Sujana Towers Limited and changed its name to Neueon Towers Limited in October 2016. Neueon Towers Limited incorporated in 2006 and is based in Hyderabad, India.
